findings.description: Slide indicator can go stale on client-side navigation between shops. Effect subscribes to Embla 'init' + 'select' events but Embla emits 'reInit' (not 'init') when slides change post-mount. If photoUrls shrinks on client-side nav from a many-photo shop to a few-photo shop, current can briefly read an impossible value like '5 / 2' until the user interacts. Fix: also subscribe to 'reInit', reset current when photoUrls changes, or call onSelect synchronously on subscription (same pattern used in components/ui/carousel.tsx line 98).
Effect subscribes to api.on('reInit', onSelect) but cleanup only calls api?.off('select', onSelect) — 'reInit' is never unsubscribed. Minor listener leak when the effect re-runs.

CarouselPrevious and CarouselNext render a Previous slide inside the Button. When ShopHero passes aria-label='Previous slide' on the component, the aria-label overrides and the sr-only span becomes dead markup. Prefer dropping the aria-label from the caller (shop-hero.tsx:77,81) since sr-only text is the shadcn default.

Rewritten test is a source-text regression guard (expect(source).toContain("import 'mapbox-gl/dist/mapbox-gl.css'")) rather than a behavior test. Testing philosophy says 'test the behavior, not the implementation'. Debatable: jsdom can't load mapbox-gl, so the source-text guard is the only way to pin the CSS import. Pragmatic, accepted.
